title: ilex lasseri
intro: Ilex lasseri, also known as the Japanese wintergreen, is a type of evergreen shrub native to East Asia. The medicinal properties of Ilex lasseri lie in its leaves, which contain a high concentration of methyl salicylate, a compound similar to aspirin. This plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties. Herbal preparations of Ilex lasseri include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other respiratory issues.
